question: Interest calculation (Daily? Monthly?)
answer:
User asked: "How is interest calculated on my loan? Daily? Monthly?"

What chatbot answered: Asked for loan amount and collateral. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about interest calculation. Chatbot asked about opening a new loan.

Fix: Add new intent for INTEREST_CALCULATION.

Correct answer:

"Interest is calculated daily on your outstanding loan balance. It accrues each day and is charged monthly. You can see your accrued interest in the Lending module of your dashboard. Would you like me to calculate the interest for a specific loan amount?"

question: Whitelist withdrawal addresses
answer:
User asked: "Can I whitelist withdrawal addresses? How long does it take to add one?"

What chatbot answered: Asked for asset and amount, then gave withdrawal processing times. Did NOT answer about whitelist.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about whitelist. Chatbot answered about withdrawals.

Fix: Add new intent for WHITELIST_ADDRESS.

Correct answer:

"Yes, you can whitelist withdrawal addresses in Settings → Security → Whitelist. Adding a new address takes 24 hours to become active — this is a security feature to prevent unauthorized changes. Would you like me to help you add a whitelisted address?"

question: Staking rewards tax
answer:
User asked: "Are staking rewards taxed? Do you provide tax statements?"

What chatbot answered: Asked which network to stake and how much. Did NOT answer tax question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. Same as previous tax issues. Intent not recognized.

Fix: Use the TAX_REPORTING intent (already identified earlier).

Correct answer:

"We do not provide tax advice — tax treatment of staking rewards depends on your jurisdiction. However, we provide full transaction history in CSV format and you can export your staking rewards report from your dashboard. We recommend consulting a qualified tax advisor. Would you like me to help you export your rewards report?"

question: OTC settlement in stablecoins
answer:
User asked: "Can I settle OTC trades in stablecoins like USDC instead of fiat?"

What chatbot answered: Yes, quoted on USDT/USDC, DAI on request, min $100K. Asked for trade size.

Why good: Answered correctly, started with "Yes", gave clear options.

Minor fix: Improve follow-up question.

Correct answer:

"Yes, you can settle OTC trades directly in stablecoins. We quote on USDT and USDC as standard, with DAI available on request. You can also redeem stablecoins for AED, USD, or EUR. Minimum trade size is $100,000 USD equivalent. Would you like me to provide a firm quote for your stablecoin settlement?"

question: Close account and delete data
answer:
User asked: "How do I close my account? Can I delete my data?"

What chatbot answered: Explained how to close account. Did NOT explicitly answer about data deletion.

Why missing: Did not address the data deletion part of the question.

Fix: Add data retention explanation.

Correct answer:

*"Yes, you can close your account once your balances are zero. Email support@alfardanq9.com to request closure. Regarding your data: most personal data will be deleted, but certain transaction records must be retained for 5-7 years due to regulatory compliance. Would you like me to send you our data retention policy?"*

question: Early loan repayment
answer:
User asked: "Can I repay my loan early? Is there a penalty?"

What chatbot answered: Asked for loan amount and collateral. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about early repayment. Chatbot asked about opening a new loan.

Fix: Add new intent for EARLY_REPAYMENT.

Correct answer:

"Yes, you can repay your loan early at any time. There is no prepayment penalty. Interest is calculated pro-rata for the actual duration of the loan. Would you like me to calculate your current payoff amount?"

question: Choose validator for ETH staking
answer:
User asked: "Can I choose which validator my ETH is staked with?"

What chatbot answered: Gave APY, rewards timing, auto-compounding info. Did NOT answer validator choice question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about validator selection. Chatbot gave general staking information.

Fix: Add new intent for VALIDATOR_CHOICE.

Correct answer:

"No, validators are selected by our institutional staking team. We use our own proprietary validator fleet to ensure maximum security, uptime, and slashing protection. You cannot choose a specific validator. Would you like me to explain how our validator selection process works?"

question: Insurance claim time
answer:
User asked: "How long does an insurance claim take? When do I get my money back?"

What chatbot answered: Gave coverage details (what is covered, what is not). Did NOT answer time question.

Why missing: Answered wrong part of the question. User asked about duration, not coverage.

Fix: Add claim processing time to insurance answers.

Correct answer:

"Insurance claims typically take 60 to 90 days from the date all required documents are submitted. You would need to provide: (1) your account details, (2) the transaction hash of the stolen assets, and (3) any relevant evidence. Our claims team will guide you through the process. Would you like me to connect you with our claims department for more specific guidance?"

question: OTC weekend trading
answer:
User asked: *"Can I trade OTC on weekends? Are quotes available 24/7?"*

What chatbot answered: Explained custody 24/7, OTC standard hours (Sun-Thu 9-6), VIP 24/7 with arrangement. Asked "What else can I help with?"

Why good: Answered correctly, gave clear distinction between standard and VIP.

Minor fix: Improve follow-up question.

Correct answer:

*"Custody and withdrawals are available 24/7 with auto-processing. For OTC, standard quotes are available during UAE business hours (Sunday to Thursday, 9 AM to 6 PM). However, weekend quotes can be arranged for VIP clients with advance notice. Would you like me to arrange a weekend OTC quote for you?"*

question: Suspicious activity on account
answer:
User asked: "What should I do if I see suspicious activity on my account?"

What chatbot answered: Explained how to view portfolio and balances. Did NOT answer security question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about security incident. Chatbot answered about portfolio view.

Fix: Add new intent for SECURITY_INCIDENT.

Correct answer:

*"If you notice any suspicious activity on your account, take immediate action: (1) Change your password, (2) Revoke any unrecognized API keys, (3) Contact our support team immediately at security@alfardanq9.com or call our 24/7 emergency line at +971 4 123 4568. Would you like me to connect you with our security team right now?"*

📊 SUMMARY TABLE (Set 4)

1	Interest calculation	Wrong intent	Add INTEREST_CALCULATION intent
2	Whitelist addresses	Wrong intent	Add WHITELIST_ADDRESS intent
3	Staking rewards tax	Wrong intent	Use TAX_REPORTING intent
4	OTC stablecoin settlement	Minor	Improve follow-up question
5	Close account + delete data	Missing info	Add data retention explanation
6	Early loan repayment	Wrong intent	Add EARLY_REPAYMENT intent
7	Choose validator	Wrong intent	Add VALIDATOR_CHOICE intent
8	Insurance claim time	Missing info	Add 60-90 days processing time
9	OTC weekend trading	Minor	Improve follow-up question
10	Suspicious activity	Wrong intent	Add SECURITY_INCIDENT intent
